meta.title: Astro Awards LIVE in-person at Paramount Theatre, Austin, TX!
meta.description:
The Everyday Astronaut team is so excited to host our first in-person event and awards show in Austin, TX on January 14, 2024 at the Paramount Theatre! Our mission: to honor and celebrate the revolutionary humans behind the hardware and missions by inviting them to accept an award IN REAL LIFE! We're merging the space industry with everyday people for the ultimate party and celebration of human achievement.

Huge thank you to the partners who made this event possible!

Firefly Aerospace who helped so much- https://fireflyspace.com/

AND

Starbase Brewing - https://starbasebrewery.com/

Space Point - https://www.spacepoint.org/

Cosmic Perspective - https://cosmicperspective.com/

See the nominees and get tickets here -  http://astroawards2024.com

Rotor Visual - https://www.rotorvisual.com/

--------------------------

Want to support what I do? Consider becoming a Patreon supporter for access to exclusive livestreams, our discord channel! - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Or become a YouTube member for some bonus perks as well! - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6uKrU_WqJ1R2HMTY3LIx5Q/join

The best place for all your space merch needs!
https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

All music is original! Check out my album "Maximum Aerodynamic Pressure" anywhere you listen to music (Spotify, iTunes, Google Play, Amazon, etc) or click here for easy links - http://everydayastronaut.com/music
